amendments.text: For multiengine turbine powered airplanes, multiengine reciprocating engine powered airplanes incorporating turbo-superchargers, and [all commuter category airplanes, the following apply:] (a) There must be a means which ensures the prompt detection of a fire in an engine compartment. (b) Each fire detector must be constructed and installed to withstand the vibration, inertia, and other loads to which it may be subjected in operation. (c) No fire detector may be affected by any oil, water, other fluids, or fumes that might be present. (d) There must be means to allow the crew to check, in flight, the functioning of each fire detector electric circuit. (e) Wiring and other components of each fire detector system in an engine compartment must be at least fire resistant.
